description_long: This is a large, yellow Varmaas RG-17 plow truck designed for heavy-duty road maintenance and snow removal. The vehicle features a robust, articulated frame with six large wheels, a spacious operator cab, and a prominent front-mounted plow blade. The cab is equipped with multiple mirrors, lights, and a roof-mounted beacon for visibility and safety. The truck's body shows signs of wear and use, with visible dirt and some surface rust, indicating it is a working vehicle. Utility markings and decals are present on the side, including the model name and other operational signage. The chassis is elevated, providing ample ground clearance for navigating rough or obstructed urban environments.
description: A large, yellow Varmaas RG-17 plow truck with a front-mounted blade, elevated chassis, and visible utility markings, designed for road maintenance and snow removal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide plow blade attachment, large tires, and the cab with mirrors and roof beacon.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the articulated frame, operator cab, utility markings, and the full length of the plow blade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cab, rear lights, and the elevated chassis with dual rear wheels.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the plow blade, articulated arm, and additional details of the cab and chassis.
